label: GTA Visa Credit Limit SMS Campaign
tactics_summary: Mass SMS to GTA residents offering fake credit limit increases via td-secure-verify.ca domains. Uses urgency and personalized amounts ($12,000–$18,000) to appear legitimate.
customer_alert: TD customers in Ontario: We've detected a wave of fake credit limit increase texts. TD will never text you a link to increase your credit limit. If you received this message, do not click — report it to Threat Decoded.

label: Fake Interac e-Transfer Email Campaign
tactics_summary: Spoofed e-transfer notifications using domains like td-etransfer-alert.com and interac-secure.ca. Targets users waiting for real e-transfers, uses realistic amounts and sender names.
customer_alert: Fraudsters are sending fake Interac e-Transfer emails. Real e-transfers come from notifications@payments.interac.ca — never from a TD address. Do not click links in suspicious e-transfer emails.

label: EasyWeb Password Reset Phishing
tactics_summary: High-volume credential harvesting via fake password reset emails. Uses near-perfect TD branding, domains registered within 30 days. Captures EasyWeb credentials on spoofed login pages.
customer_alert: Warning: TD will never send you an unsolicited password reset link. If you received an email asking you to reset your TD password, do not click. Go directly to td.com in your browser.

label: CRA Tax Refund TD Account SMS
tactics_summary: Fake CRA tax refund notifications asking users to deposit refund via their TD account by clicking a link. Targets TD customers during tax season. Uses cra-refund-td.com style domains.
customer_alert: Scam alert: Fraudsters are texting fake CRA tax refunds referencing your TD account. CRA never sends refunds via text link. Report any such messages to Threat Decoded.

label: TD Visa Suspicious Activity Alert Scam
tactics_summary: Fake 'suspicious activity detected' alerts for TD Visa cards. Creates panic with specific fake transaction amounts to prompt immediate credential entry. Often targets seniors.
customer_alert: Fake TD Visa fraud alerts are circulating via email. TD's real fraud alerts never ask you to verify credentials by clicking a link. Call 1-800-983-8472 directly if you're concerned about your card.
